Who is the referee and what is the officiating profile for this match?

What are the expected starting lineups and rotation risks?

summary.el: Dalian Yingbo - Shandong Taishan: ανάλυση με βάση ιστορικά και διαθέσιμα δεδομένα. Dalian Yingbo: 2-1-2 στα τελευταία 5. Shandong Taishan: 2-1-2 στα τελευταία 5. Το historical layer βασίστηκε σε 1313 διαθέσιμες εγγραφές αγώνων. Στα τελευταία 3 μεταξύ τους: Dalian Yingbo 2 νίκες, ισοπαλίες 0, Shandong Taishan 1 νίκες. Το H2H γέρνει προς τους γηπεδούχους. Βαθμολογικό context: Dalian Yingbo=relegation, Shandong Taishan=title. Απουσίες: Dalian Yingbo=severe, Shandong Taishan=minor. Lineup context: Dalian Yingbo=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced; Shandong Taishan=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:strong. Υπάρχει διαθέσιμο team news context στο enriched snapshot. Υπάρχει διαθέσιμο lineup context στο enriched snapshot.
summary.en: Dalian Yingbo vs Shandong Taishan: contextual analysis using historical and available data. Dalian Yingbo: 2-1-2 across the last 5. Shandong Taishan: 2-1-2 across the last 5. The historical layer was based on 1313 available match records. Across the last 3 head-to-head meetings: Dalian Yingbo 2 wins, draws 0, Shandong Taishan 1 wins. The head-to-head profile leans toward the home side. Table context: Dalian Yingbo=relegation, Shandong Taishan=title. Absences: Dalian Yingbo=severe, Shandong Taishan=minor. Lineup context: Dalian Yingbo=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced; Shandong Taishan=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:strong. Team news context is available in the enriched snapshot. Lineup context is available in the enriched snapshot.
